title: Modern Studio in the Heart of the City
description: Bright and airy studio in a prime downtown location. Walking distance to subway, restaurants, and shopping.

title: Cozy 1-Bedroom Apartment
description: Charming apartment with hardwood floors, exposed brick, and a private balcony. Pet friendly.

title: Spacious 2-Bedroom Townhouse
description: Beautiful townhouse with stunning Manhattan views, an eat-in kitchen, and private backyard.

title: Luxury 3-Bedroom Penthouse
description: Stunning penthouse with panoramic city views, high-end finishes, and a private rooftop terrace.

title: Sun-Filled 2-Bedroom Condo
description: Modern condo with open-plan living, floor-to-ceiling windows, and in-unit laundry.

title: Charming 1-Bedroom in Historic Building
location: Upper West Side, New York, NY
description: Classic pre-war apartment with high ceilings, original moldings, and a sunny corner exposure.
